about me

Passionate about building things

I'm Swasthiga B S, a final-year Computer Science Engineering student at KLN College of Engineering with a CGPA of 8.6. I specialise in Java full-stack development and also explore Machine Learning, building real-world systems that solve meaningful problems.

From detecting fake job posts with NLP to building AI-powered memory assistance for Alzheimer's patients — I love projects where technology genuinely helps people. I've published journal papers and participated in hackathons like Smart India Hackathon and TECHATHON 2K25.

Featured Projects

🔍
GitHub ↗
Fake Job Post Detection

ML model to classify job posts as real or fake using NLP preprocessing. Trained Logistic Regression, SVM, and Naïve Bayes classifiers — evaluated on accuracy, precision, and recall.

PythonScikit-learnNLPTF-IDFML

Alzheimer's AI Memory Assistant

AI-driven system to analyse patient behaviour patterns and provide personalised memory assistance for Alzheimer's care, with cognitive performance tracking and caregiver insights.

PythonMachine LearningMySQLFlaskAI

Rocket Launch Simulator

Java-based rocket launch simulation system demonstrating object-oriented design patterns and real-time state management for aerospace systems.

JavaOOPSimulation

Design Patterns Demo

Comprehensive implementation of classic software design patterns (Creational, Structural, Behavioural) in both Java and Python with real-world usage examples.

JavaPythonDesign PatternsOOP

Automatic Number Plate Detection

Real-time vehicle number plate detection system built for Velammal Hackathon. Uses computer vision and OCR to automatically detect, extract, and recognise licence plate text from live video or images.

PythonOpenCVOCRComputer VisionDeep Learning
🏆 Velammal Hackathon
🏥
GitHub ↗
MedEase — Smart Healthcare Platform

Healthcare web application developed for K. Ramakrishna Hackathon. Simplifies patient management, appointment booking, and medical record access — making healthcare easier for patients and providers alike.

Full StackJavaSpring BootMySQLAngular
🏆 K. Ramakrishna Hackathon
🥦
GitHub ↗
NutriClass — Food Classification

ML model classifying food items into categories using nutritional data (calories, proteins, carbs, fats, sugar). Trained Logistic Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost & SVM with PCA-based feature engineering.

PythonScikit-learnXGBoostPCAML
🍽️
GitHub ↗
Swiggy Restaurant Recommender

Restaurant recommendation system built with Streamlit using K-Means clustering & cosine similarity on Swiggy data. Users input city, cuisine, rating & cost to get personalised restaurant suggestions.

PythonStreamlitK-MeansCosine SimilarityOne-Hot Encoding
